prompt:
Maintain the twin characters from the reference image, realistic live-action style, large-scale cosplay event venue. Indoor exhibition hall. A glamorous space where many cosplayers and photographers gather. Event-like lighting and a lively atmosphere. 

The twins are cosplaying as female ninjas that look like they could appear in a popular game or anime. Both are wearing exactly the same outfit. Beautiful ninja attire based on red and white. Completely matching from ninja-style tops, arm covers, waist cloths, boots, to small accessories. Hairstyles and makeup are also the same, making them almost indistinguishable at first glance. 

However, there is an extreme difference in popularity at the venue. A large crowd of photographers and fans gather in front of one of the twins. Fans pointing cameras with telephoto lenses, SLRs, and smartphones. Flashes are shining, and there is even a line waiting for a photo. The popular twin is posing with a smile. The surrounding area is thriving and has become a highlight spot of the event. 

Meanwhile, the other twin is standing a few meters away, but there is no one around. Despite having the same costume and same face, not a single person is pointing a camera at her. She is looking at the popular twin with a slightly lonely expression. Standing still with nothing to do. A poignant expression. 

The camera captures the entire venue with a wide-angle shot, showing an extreme contrast between the popular cosplayer surrounded by many fans on the left and the unpopular cosplayer with absolutely no people on the right. A comical situation where only the treatment is vastly different despite having the same face and same costume. 

Realistic atmosphere of the event venue, natural crowds, heat characteristic of a cosplay event, and documentary-style reality. Natural expressions, realistic skin texture, photorealistic, ultra-high definition, realistic event photography quality. Realistic TV show/documentary quality. No corporate logos or real group names. 

At the top of the screen, there is a TV-style caption: "Close-up on a popular cosplayer", and at the bottom, "The contrast between twins is clear".
